title: Biodegradable Bin Bags Liner 120 Counts, 10L Food Waste Bags Trash Bag Small, 10 Litre Compostable Compost Caddy Liners, Recycled Degradable Rubbish Garbage Bag for Kitchen Office, Green. 45 x 50cm
features: 10 Litre Biodegradable Bin Liners – KITBEST biodegradable bin bags are made from corn starch, compostable and biodegradable, which are non-toxic and harmless. Moreover, our compostable bin bags can be naturally degraded with certain sunlight, air and water in natural environment. Take these rubbish bags home now for a better participation in protecting the environment

10 Litres Small & Sturdy Bin Bags – With the size of 45cm (W) x 50cm (H), these small 10l bin bags are ideal for most small garbage bins in kitchen. A special octagonal design is adopted on the bottom of garbage bags for firm corners and super load-bearing preventing liquid leakage. Moreover, KITBEST thickened garbage bags to avoid puncture, leakage and splits. No odor will ever flow out when the tie is sealed
120 Breakpoint Compost Waste Bags – Each package includes 120 trash bags (6 rolls, 20 bags per roll). The breakpoint design of rubbish bags ensures easy tearing without being ripped

Multi-Functional 10 Litres Bin Liners – These small 10 Litres small bin bags perfectly fit most small bins and pedal bins for indoor use. Thick echo-friendly material and compact size make these compostable bin liners an ideal choice for kitchen, bathroom, living room, bedroom, office and garden use

Better Environment Protection – Every time you order our KITBEST 10 Litres Biodegradable Bin Liners, you help reduce the amount of those harmful black plastic bags entering circulation and better protect your surrounding environment
